title: ETERNITYMINE - The modpack
description: Modpack to improve the experience and optimize the game
body:
# This modpack is designed to give the best experience in multiplayer game. With one click.
We hope that everyone will like our modpack and join our [server](https://discord.com/invite/KetCvwKsEn) :)

## This modpack supports all basic features of _Optifine_ texturepacks.
Because of these mods:
-[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
-[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
-[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
-[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/version/3.0.0-beta.5+1.21) 


## Improved visuals and game mechanics
### Visuals:
- [Falling leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) - Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks.
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Shader pack loader.
- [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain) - Replaces weather with prettier particle effects.
- [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list.

### Mechanics:
- [Just Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-zoom) - Zoom by pressing a hotkey.
- [Click Through](https://modrinth.com/mod/click-through-updated) - Click through signs and item frames.
- [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) - See what CIT and CEM Renames are in your Resource Packs!
- [AutoLogin](https://modrinth.com/mod/autologin) - Automatically registers and logs in.
- [Auto Reconnect](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoreconnectrf) - AutoReconnect mod.
- [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches) - A Minecraft Fabric client-side mod that touches up a few aspects of Minecraft's mundane chat, with as much configurability as possible!
- [Continue Button](https://modrinth.com/mod/continue) - Continue the last world or server you played from the title screen.
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory.
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - Mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD.

## Mods to optimize game
-[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) 
-[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
-[Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
-[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)

## ReplayMod
[ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) is here to give you an ability to see what was once there.

[And the sound recording ](https://modrinth.com/mod/replay-voice-chat)

## Voice Chat
[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - A working voice chat in Minecraft!

## Litematica
[Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) - A client-side schematic mod with extra features for creative mode work

## View your world from new perspectives
-[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) -[Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)

## Ability to show your emotions in the game
[Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft) - Create your own emotes in Minecraft.

### There are 300+ animations in modpack
[SP-Emotes](https://spemotes.com/) are present in modpack, thanks to [Milyan]~~~~(https://www.youtube.com/@m1lyan) for the emotes.
